OBJECTIONS TO EXTRINSIC EVIDENCE IN PLTF'S OPPOS. BRIEF TO DEFT'S DEMURRER TO PLTF'S SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT RODRICK FOODS, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302,DEFENDANT RODRICK FOODS, INC'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGES INTENTIONAL PHYSICAL ACT THAT THE EMPLOYER RATIFIED. WHILE SOME ALLEGATIONS ARE SLOPPY OR INCONSISTENT, UNDER CCP 452 AND IVERSON, THE CAUSE OF ACTION SURVIVES. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 2ND AND 3RD CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THESES SOUND IN NEGLIGENCE (FAILURE TO MAINTAIN A SAFE WORKPLACE) AND DO NOT MEET THE IVERSON EXCEPTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT RODRICK FOODS, INC'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS THAT SHOW RATIFICATION OR JOINT PARTICIPATION OF PLAINTIFF'S EMPLOYER IN ORDER TO CIRCUMVENT WORKER'S COMPENSATION EXCLUSIVITY RULE. IN ADDITION, THE COURT STATED THAT PLAINTIFF IS TO FILE THE AMENDED COMPLAINT BY 06/20/11. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: JOANNE FARRELL, CSR #4838

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-02-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT RODRICK FOODS, INC'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES.
Appearances: James F. Blake of Burnham Brown (510.444.6800) for defendant and moving party; Lauren B. Gelber of the Law Offices of Brian L. Larsen (398.5000) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and responding party.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: defendant's demurrer to the 1st cause of action is overruled. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges intentional physical act that the employer ratified. While some allegations are sloppy or inconsistent, under CCP 452 and Iverson, the cause of action survives. Defendant's demurrer to the 2nd and 3rd causes of action is sustained without leave to amend. Theses sound in negligence (failure to maintain a safe workplace) and do not meet the Iverson exception. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2011 Continued To Aug-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT RODRICK FOODS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FOR DAMAGES.

APPEARANCES: Lauren B. Gelber, Esq. of The Law Offices of Brian L. Larsen 398-5000 for pltf & opposing party (appearing via CourtCall); James F. Blake, Esq. of Burnham Brown 510/444-6800 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS THAT SHOW RATIFICATION OR JOINT PARTICIPATION OF PLAINTIFF'S EMPLOYER IN ORDER TO CIRCUMVENT WORKER'S COMPENSATION EXCLUSIVITY RULE. In addition, the Court stated that plaintiff is to file the amended complaint by 06/20/11. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Joanne Farrell, CSR #4838
